data.title: Ronin will migrate to Ethereum Layer 2 on May 12, and the RON inflation rate will drop below 1%.
data.description: Ronin, a gaming public blockchain, announced its migration to Ethereum Layer 2 on May 12th. The underlying layer will utilize the OP Stack and integrate EigenDA as the data availability layer. On-chain operations are expected to be suspended for approximately 10 hours during the migration. The team recommends that users unstake their RON in advance or allow the system to handle this automatically after the migration is complete. Following this upgrade, RON's annual inflation rate will decrease from over 20% to below 1%, and treasury revenue will include new sources of income from staking rewards, Sequencer net revenue, and Marketplace fees. Furthermore, Ronin has launched a "Proof-of-Distribution" incentive mechanism based on "Builder Score," distributing RON rewards to ecosystem builders monthly.

data.title: U.S. Stock Indices Decline Amid Market Volatility Ahead of FOMC Decision
data.description: The U.S. stock market experienced increased volatility, leading to a decline in the three major indices ahead of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) decision. According to PANews, concerns have arisen due to OpenAI's performance not meeting expectations, which has contributed to market unease. Additionally, Bitcoin sellers are showing concentrated liquidity in the $78,000 to $80,000 range.

data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority Warns of Fraudulent Tokens
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has issued a warning regarding tokens labeled "HKDAP" and "HSBC," stating that they are fraudulent and not associated with licensed issuers HSBC or Anchorpoint Financial. According to NS3.AI, both HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial have confirmed that they have not launched any stablecoins in Hong Kong. HSBC is planning to introduce an HKD-denominated stablecoin in the second half of this year, while Anchorpoint Financial intends to commence a phased launch of HKDAP in the second quarter of this year.

data.title: Analyst Peter Brandt Advises Bitcoin Enthusiasts to Temper Expectations
data.description: Renowned trader and chart analyst Peter Brandt, known for accurately predicting Bitcoin's 2018 crash, recently shared insights on Bitcoin's price trajectory. According to ChainCatcher, Brandt released a chart indicating that Bitcoin enthusiasts should abandon the notion of the cryptocurrency reaching $250,000 this year. Brandt argues that the current Bitcoin trend resembles a channel pattern rather than a bullish bottom reversal. While this pattern does not rule out further price increases, it lacks strong signals of a robust bottom.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Jewelry Prices in China Drop by 30 Yuan per Gram
data.description: On April 29, Jin10 reported a decline in gold jewelry prices across several brands in China. According to Jin10, the prices fell by approximately 30 yuan per gram compared to the previous day, with most quotes hovering around 1,410 yuan per gram.

data.title: Gensyn Announces Launch of AI Token
data.description: Gensyn, a decentralized AI computing protocol, has announced the launch of its AI token on April 29. According to Foresight News, the token is set to go live today, marking a significant step for the protocol in expanding its offerings in the AI sector.

data.title: Thailand's Central Bank Revises Economic Growth and Inflation Forecasts for 2026
data.description: Thailand's central bank has adjusted its economic projections for 2026. According to Jin10, the bank now expects the country's economy to grow by 1.5%, a decrease from the 1.9% forecast made in February. Additionally, the overall inflation rate for 2026 is projected to be 2.9%, a significant increase from the 0.3% predicted in December.

data.title: UBS CEO Warns of Over-Optimism in Financial Markets Amid Iran Conflict
data.description:
UBS Group CEO Sergio Ermotti has expressed concerns about excessive optimism in financial markets regarding the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, Ermotti noted that markets are not only expecting the situation to be resolved but also anticipating that the impact of events will be mitigated in a conventional manner. Despite the escalating conflict in Iran and the lack of a sustainable resolution, U.S. stock markets have reached historic highs. Ermotti stated, 'The market is quite optimistic, and we hope this optimism is justified.' He emphasized the importance of diversification to hedge against potential reversal risks.

Ermotti also addressed the new Swiss capital regulation framework currently under parliamentary review. He dismissed claims that UBS is heavily lobbying Swiss lawmakers to relax regulatory requirements. 'We are not engaging in strong lobbying,' he said. 'We are simply representing the interests of our shareholders.'

data.title: PI Surges 17.2% Amid Protocol v22 Launch and KYC Milestone
data.description: PI has experienced a significant increase of 17.2% over the past week and 6.4% in the last 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, this rise is attributed to the launch of Protocol v22, which introduces smart contracts, and the completion of 526 million human KYC validation tasks by over 1 million verified individuals. Despite this recent uptick, PI remains more than 87% below its value from late April 2025 and 93.4% lower than its all-time high of $2.99 on February 26, 2025.

data.title: Aptos Introduces New Privacy Coin 'Confidential APT'
data.description:
Aptos has announced the launch of a new privacy coin, 'Confidential APT,' which is pegged 1:1 with APT. According to Foresight News, the coin utilizes zero-knowledge proofs to conceal balances and transaction amounts while maintaining transaction verifiability. This feature will be officially available on Friday following a governance proposal that was nearly unanimously approved.

Sherry Xiao, a founding engineer at Aptos Labs, stated that the privacy coin aims to prevent competitors from tracking treasury movements and transaction strategies during on-chain business transactions. It also addresses the issue of employee salaries being permanently public on the blockchain, reducing the risk of users being targeted by wallet profiling or scams.

data.title: Wallet Linked to Distributed Capital Deposits ETH to CEX
data.description: On April 29, a wallet associated with Distributed Capital deposited 3,063 ETH into a centralized exchange (CEX). According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, these ETH were withdrawn from the same CEX a month ago at an average price of $2,017 each. The current deposit reflects an increase in value of approximately $969,000.

data.title: Marc Andreessen Updates X Account Banner
data.description: Marc Andreessen, co-founder of a16z, has updated the banner on his X account. According to Odaily, this change was noted recently.

data.title: a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen changed his X account banner.
data.description: a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen has changed his X account banner.

data.title: Bloomberg Analysis Reveals Losses for Polymarket Users
data.description: A Bloomberg analysis has revealed that regular users of Polymarket have collectively lost $131 million, while automated bots have captured the majority of profits. According to NS3.AI, the analysis examined approximately two million active addresses since early 2025, identifying over 100,000 accounts that incurred losses exceeding $1,000.

data.title: Bitwise CIO Highlights MicroStrategy's Role in Bitcoin Rally
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has shown resilience amid geopolitical tensions, with its price trending higher since late February. According to BeInCrypto, Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan attributes this rally to MicroStrategy's significant Bitcoin purchases. MicroStrategy's strategic acquisitions have been a key factor in Bitcoin's 20% rebound, highlighting the company's influence on the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin's Monthly Return Expected to Reach 12-Month High
data.description:
Bitcoin's recent decline may soon be overshadowed by a potential record monthly return, according to ChainCatcher. Coinglass data reveals that Bitcoin's current return rate stands at 12.68%, slightly below the historical average of 13.04% but above the median of 9.97%.

In contrast, Ethereum's current return rate is 9.91%, which is below its historical average of 19.06%.

data.title: Meme Coin ASTEROID Surges Over 100% Amid Vitalik's Token Sale
data.description: The meme coin ASTEROID, based on the Ethereum blockchain, experienced a significant increase in value, rising over 100% in a short period. According to Odaily, the current market capitalization of ASTEROID is reported at $14.5 million. This surge may be influenced by news of Vitalik Buterin selling related tokens.

data.title: Crypto Whales Accumulate Tokens Ahead of April FOMC Meeting
data.description: The April 29 FOMC decision is expected to result in a rate hold with a 99% probability, yet crypto whales are actively positioning ahead of the meeting, according to BeInCrypto. Analysts have identified three tokens experiencing significant whale accumulation, each influenced by unique factors. This strategic buying occurs as market participants anticipate Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's remarks, highlighting the proactive stance of large investors in the crypto space.

data.title: Vitalik sold 40 million ASTEROID tokens, raising approximately $114,600.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Vitalik has begun selling the gifted Meme tokens. He sold 40 million ASTEROID tokens, earning approximately $114,600 USDC. Monitoring indicates that he may sell more gifted tokens.

data.title: Possibly influenced by Vitalik's sale, the Ethereum blockchain OG ASTEROID surged by over 100% in a short period.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Ethereum blockchain's OG Meme coin ASTEROID saw a short-term surge of over 100%, currently boasting a market capitalization of $14.5 million, possibly influenced by news of Vitalik's sale of related tokens. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.
